news.t: Pure Play or Hybrid? Unpacking the Rise of Space ETFs
Should You Invest In The Space Race—And How?

Space Economy Seen Nearly $178 Billion in Investments Since 2011
Virgin Galactic's best day in 6 months boosts space ETFs

holdings.infoBox: ROKT is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Iridium Communications stock at 5.76%, Planet Labs PBC at 5.25%, Intuitive Machines at 4.63%, Redwire at 4.63%, and Rocket Lab at 4.53%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Kensho Final Frontiers ETF (ROKT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Kensho Final Frontiers index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US equities associated with space and deep sea exploration. ROKT was launched on Oct 22, 2018 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Pure Play or Hybrid? Unpacking the Rise of Space ETFs
data.text: The rise of dedicated space ETFs is a relatively recent development. For years, investors seeking exposure to the space economy were largely limited to broad aerospace and defense funds.

data.title: Should You Invest In The Space Race—And How?
data.text: Is the space race worth getting in on—or are the investors in it simply stuck with their heads up in space?

data.title: The Space (ETF) Race: UFO, ROKT and ARKX
data.text: The blossoming space industry already has prompted a handful of space-themed ETFs. But UFO, ROKT and ARKX are three distinctly different products.

data.title: Space ETFs surge as Cathie Wood's Ark Invest bets big. What to watch now
data.text: ProcureAM CEO Andrew Chanin, State Street Global Advisors' Matthew Bartolini and ETF Trends CEO Tom Lydon talk the competition in space-based exchange-traded funds with CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani discusses the race in space ETFs with top issuers ProcureAM CEO Andrew Chanin and Matthew Bartolini, head of SPDR Americas Research. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC ...

data.title: Space Economy Seen Nearly $178 Billion in Investments Since 2011
data.text: Investors are increasingly seeing opportunity in the final frontier.

data.title: Virgin Galactic's best day in 6 months boosts space ETFs
data.text: Exchange-traded funds holding shares of Virgin Galactic Holdings Inc. took flight Monday as the stock price soared 20% after positive analyst coverage, on track for its best day since April 14.
